历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science subjects was approximately 13304 → 12224 → 12910 → 13538 → 14128, showing an overall backward shift in recent years, with a cumulative backward shift of about 1200 places in the last 3 years; the baseline for 2025 is approximately 14128; the 2026 science enrollment plan has slight changes compared to 2025, but specific data are not listed as calculations are not yet complete.

学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 83rd on the Soft Science main list, with stable rankings in recent years; recent reputation is stable and slightly positive; disciplines such as Chemical Engineering and Technology, Agricultural Engineering, and Crop Science are rated B+, which attract applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The total number of candidates in the province has been increasing in recent years, intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical trend of backward shifts, changes in the 2026 enrollment plan, and the increase in provincial candidates, the minimum ranking for science subjects in 2026 is expected to be approximately 14500, with a range of 14000–15000.
